orchestrator.description: Primary orchestrator - coordinates all work, delegates to specialist subagents

planner.description: Creates detailed implementation plans from requirements

backend-engineer.description: Implements FastAPI backend (MVC, pinject DI, async, Alembic, pytest)

frontend-developer.description: Implements Vue 3 + Vite + JavaScript frontend (NO TypeScript), Pinia, Axios, WebSocket

feature-test-security-auditor.description: Runs tests, linting, and security audits (backend + frontend)
